Quality Education.reason: The course is a master's level seminar (tertiary education, Target 4.3) focused on strengthening professional knowledge and research/innovation skills (Target 4.4), and sharing new knowledge (Target 4.7). Model B's original reasoning is more comprehensive.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course strengthens professional knowledge and innovation skills in information security, contributing to technological upgrading and preparing students for decent jobs in a high-value sector (Target 8.2, 8.5). Model B's reasoning is accurate.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course emphasizes 'information security ethics and law' (Core Competency D), which directly supports the rule of law (Target 16.3) and building effective, accountable institutions (Target 16.6). Model B's reasoning is accurate.
